name: kloppy-desktop
description: Kloppy: a retro desktop gremlin assistant. He means well. Probably.
//build: electron-builder packaging config lives in electron-builder.config.js (a .js file so it can carry comments — see the macOS ad-hoc signing hook there). Passed via --config: it must not be named electron-builder.js, or Windows cmd resolves the bare `electron-builder` command to it and the build silently no-ops (electron-builder#4859).

scripts.check: node --check src/actions.js && node --check src/chats.js && node --check src/llm.js && node --check src/main.js && node --check src/memories.js && node --check src/model-setup.js && node --check src/notes.js && node --check src/personality.js && node --check src/preload.js && node --check src/reminders.js && node --check src/settings.js && node --check src/storage.js && node --check src/tray-art.js && node --check src/tray-icon.js && node --check src/watcher.js && node --check scripts/generate-icon.js && node --check src/renderer/app.js && node --check src/renderer/popup.js && node --check electron-builder.config.js && node --check test/chats.test.js && node --check test/llm-intents.test.js && node --check test/llm-server.test.js && node --check test/memories.test.js && node --check test/model-setup.test.js && node --check test/notes-reminders.test.js && node --check test/settings.test.js && node --check test/storage.test.js
